sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36928" key="e)carmo/nios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξαρμόνιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n36928.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">out of harmony, discordant,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">καμπαί</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:145:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">145.9</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
